title: Smart glasses are selling hot at National Vision, CEO ties it to the premium consumer
summary: Meta Platforms' (META) new Ray-Ban smart glasses are one of the fastest-selling products at eyeglass retailer National Vision (EYE). National Vision CEO Alex Wilkes comes on Market Domination to discuss the latest consumer buying trends around the new generation of wearable technology.

title: Could AMD's new Helios AI rack system push it to outperform Nvidia?
summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) unveiled its latest AI infrastructure product, the Helios rackscale systems for data centers. Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley outlines AMD's latest raft of microprocessors and other products that aim to put it in direct competition with chip competitor Nvidia (NVDA). AMD is currently scheduled to report second quarter earnings on Tuesday, August 4, well ahead of Nvidia's earnings release expected out on Wednesday, August 26.

title: Europe just fined Google $1 billion, the day before Trump is expected to announce tariffs
summary: The European Commission fined Google the equivalent of about $1 billion Thursday for manipulating its search results to hurt competitors and blocking app developers from directing customers to cheaper deals outside its Play store.

title: Stock Market Today, July 23: Alphabet Slides 7% After Announcing 2026 Capex of Roughly $200 Billion
summary: Today, July 23, 2026, investors punished the search giant after it raised capital spending forecasts again, signaling aggressive AI investment ahead.

title: Why Americans Are Fighting the AI Data Center Boom
summary: Dozens of data center developers and utilities pledged with President Donald Trump that AI data centers won’t raise consumer electricity bills. The opposition won’t back down.

title: Goldman Offers Way to Trade AI Junk Bonds $250 Million at a Time
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Goldman Sachs Group Inc. and JPMorgan Chase & Co. launched products this week allowing investors to quickly cut — or ramp up — exposure to tech industry debt, as concerns mount over hyperscalers’ huge future bond sales for artificial intelligence investments.Most Read from BloombergRetina Chip Designed to Restore Sight to Go on Sale in EuropeHegseth Turns to UNC, Virginia Tech After Dropping Ivy LeagueApple Plans Overhaul of MacBooks, iMac in Push to Meet AI DemandAlphabet Falls a

title: When AI CapEx Eats Cash: Is Alphabet’s Huge Bet Building a Moat or Sinking Margins?
summary: Alphabet  reported blowout earnings results late Wednesday, but the stock is dropping after the search giant again raised its forecast for capital expenditures.  The Google-parent reported second-quarter adjusted earnings of $9.11 per share, well ahead of Wall Street’s consensus estimate for earnings of $2.88 per share, according to FactSet.  Alphabet said the results included $6.26 a share in gains on the fair value of its equity securities.

title: Why Nvidia Stock Isn’t Rallying as It Should After Alphabet Earnings
summary: The Google parent’s results have provided fuel for a rally in chip stocks, but Nvidia has been left behind.

title: Big Tech's Off-Balance-Sheet AI Debt Reportedly Tops $1.65 Trillion: Ed Zitron Says It 'Should Be a Shareholder Riot'
summary: Big Tech is reportedly sitting on $1.65 trillion in debt that investors can’t see on any balance sheet, and prominent tech critic Ed Zitron calls it “a corporate scandal.” The figure comes from a Nikkei Asia study of Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META), Oracle (NYSE:ORCL), Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL), Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) and Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN). title: Meta drops out of a major clean energy pact as its natural gas buildout accelerates
summary: Meta has made significant investments in natural gas over the past year. Now it's dropping out of an industry renewable energy group.
